steps.title: Identify the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank verb is its ruminations on fourteenth-century Persian life. The noun ruminations is plural, making the entire subject phrase plural.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A verb must agree in number with its subject. The subject is plural, so the verb must be plural—choice A, influence, is the only plural verb form. Choices B, C, and D are all singular forms, violating agreement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
